description_long: This is a classic black rotary dial corded telephone, featuring a robust rectangular base with a gently sloped top surface. The handset is thick and ergonomically curved, resting securely on a cradle at the top of the base. A coiled cord connects the handset to the left side of the base, providing flexibility for movement while in use. The rotary dial is prominently positioned on the front, with clear finger holes and visible numbers for dialing. The surface of the phone is glossy and hard, reflecting light and showing minor wear consistent with frequent handling. This type of phone is typically found in private homes or offices, evoking a vintage aesthetic.
description: A vintage black rotary dial corded telephone with a glossy finish, coiled cord, and prominent handset resting on a cradle. The rotary dial and robust base give it a classic, retro appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, cradle, and coiled cord attached to the handset.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handset and the sloped top of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handset and the smooth, unadorned back of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the coiled cord extending from the handset and the rotary dial's profile.
